# 01. Trading Strategy

> The trading-strategy index of the vibe-investing repository by Dennis Kim (HoKwang Kim). It collects quant strategies, LLM prompts, and academic-paper-driven research spanning US equities (NASDAQ / S&P 500), cryptocurrency, and the luxury sector. The methodology running through the entire folder is Multi-LLM Cross-Validation: the same prompt is fed to Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek; consensus across models is treated as a robust signal, divergence marks where a human must verify against primary sources, and the design rests on the hypothesis that the future quant system is a committee of AIs with different philosophies rather than a single super-intelligence. MIT License. For research and education only, not investment advice.

## Index

- [README (Korean)](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Readme.MD): Korean entry point; reading-order guidance for beginners, themes, data-only, and latest ideas.
- [README (English)](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Readme%20EN.md): English version of the entry point.
- [Main repo README](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/README.md): Top-level vibe-investing repository overview and disclaimer.
- [Paper folder README](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/Paper%20%EB%85%BC%EB%AC%B8/readme.md): Four SSRN working papers that form the academic basis for several crypto strategies here.

## Latest Ideas (Hedge-Fund Committee Concept)

- [AI Hedge Fund Analysis Report](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/AI-hedge-fund/Readme.md) (Korean): Analysis of virattt/ai-hedge-fund (50k+ GitHub stars). Agents emulating 14 legendary investors (Buffett, Munger, Wood, and others) collaborate with valuation, technical, fundamental, sentiment, risk, and portfolio-manager agents on LangGraph. Supports OpenAI/Groq/Anthropic/DeepSeek/Ollama. The latest direction: run LLM personalities like an investment committee.
- [ARDS - Adaptive Recession-Defensive Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/ARDS%3A%20Adaptive%20Recession-Defensive%20Strategy/readme.md) (2026-05-18, Korean, 4-LLM): The newest research, built on the hedge-fund-committee concept. A dynamic defensive portfolio pursuing asymmetric alpha at recession onset, designed as the symmetric hedge to AMQS-M7. Macro diagnosis converges (all four models Phase 3 Recession-Warning) while execution diverges (weights 85% Claude to 225% DeepSeek, a 14x gap); only unanimous ticker was GLD. English update pending.
- [ARDS-X - Regime Classifier](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/ARDS%20%E2%80%94%20Adaptive%20Recession-Defensive%20Strategy%20for%20AI_QQQ/README.md) (2026-06-06, Korean + English, KR/EN/CN prompts, reproducible code + dashboard + backtest): The real-data extension of ARDS. Computes the same 5-Factor recession composite from free real data (yfinance + FRED free CSV, no API key) instead of LLM estimation, and adds a price-structure axis (drawdown/trend/oversold) to form a two-axis regime map. Classifies whether the decline in US Big-Tech + AI/Infra and the S&P 500 / Nasdaq-100 is a Correction, short-term Oversold dip, structural Downtrend, or Recession-driven rebalancing (5 states), then hands off to the sibling strategy (correction/oversold to AMQS momentum, recession to ARDS defense) - a regime switch, not a standalone trading tool. 2014-2026 backtest: correction/oversold windows returned ~+5% over 60 days (77% hit rate); the proxy-only macro axis over-fired on recession during the 2022-24 yield-curve inversion (BEAR_TRAP), proving real FRED labor/LEI data is essential to identify true recessions.

## Strategies by Theme

- [AMQS - Adaptive Momentum Quant Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Adaptive%20Momentum%20Quant%20Strategy%20(AMQS)/readme.md) (2026-05-02, AI/Momentum, Korean + KR/EN prompts): Fully open-sourced code and backtest of an AI supercycle momentum weekly-rebalance strategy. 2024-01 to 2026-04 backtest: AMQS +114.1% vs QQQ +46.2%, Sharpe 1.33, MDD -16.9%. 4-Factor Composite momentum + macro regime filter (QQQ 200-day MA / VIX) + weekly rebalancing. 4th generation of the series.
- [AMQS-M7](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Adaptive%20Momentum%20Quant%20Strategy%20(AMQS)%20for%20M7/readme.md) (AI/Momentum, Korean + KR/EN/CN prompts): M7-specialized extension (AAPL/MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META/NVDA/TSLA) adding a fifth Pullback-in-Uptrend dimension with a four-gate filter to block falling knives.
- [Token Unlock 72h Shock Analysis](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Token%20unlock%2072h%20shock%20analysis%20/readme.MD) (2026-04-23, Crypto/Microstructure, English, reproduction code): 46 of 52 Binance token unlocks (88.5%) show negative 72-hour returns (mean -16.97%, binomial p=2.2e-9). Repository for SSRN Paper #1 (6632838); 8 Python scripts + 10 CSVs reproduce every table.
- [Binance Listing Day Crash](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Binance%20Listing%20Day%20Crash%20/Listing%20day%20crash%20analysis.md) (2026-04-20, Crypto/Microstructure, Korean): Census of 51 Binance listings (2024-2025); 96.1% declined within 24 hours (72h mean -45.24%). Even on BTC +5% days tokens fell -35.2% on average. Includes LST-10 Ultimate Hybrid short strategy. Part 5 of a five-part column series. English update pending.
- [Trading Strategy That Devours Binance Alpha MM Bots](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Trading%20strategy%20that%20devours%20Binance%20Alpha%20MM%20bots/Binance%20alpha%20mm%20bot%20analysis.MD) (2026-04-20, Crypto/Microstructure, Korean): Analysis of 221 Binance Alpha listings proposing the MBP-5 five-phase MM-bot model (Accumulation, Pump Signal, Peak Formation, Distribution, Capitulation). STR-07 Hybrid short at Phase 3 scored 86% win rate, Sharpe 3.25 in backtests. Part 2 of the series. English update pending.
- [BNB Trading Bot - BNB-ETH Quantitative Analysis](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/BNB%20Trading%20Bot/Readme.md) (Crypto, Korean / English / Chinese): 4-year BNB-ETH statistical analysis plus a BNB trading signal from ETH moving-average crossovers. After HODLer airdrops correlation holds but beta falls 0.643 to 0.534 (decoupling); backtest +123.21%. Connects to SSRN Paper #4 (6750298).
- [Bitcoin-Nasdaq Coupling Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Investment%20Strategy%20Based%20on%20Bitcoin%20and%20Nasdaq%20Coupling/IdeaNodte.MD) (2026-04, Crypto/Macro, Korean, short idea note): BTC-Nasdaq correlation swung from a 2025 average of 0.52 to -0.20 in April 2026 (10-year low). Key observation: asymmetric coupling, falling together but rising separately. English update pending.
- [Luxury Investment Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Luxury%20investment%20strategy/Luxury%20investment%20strategy.md) (2026-04-19, Sector, Korean): Beginner-friendly column-style sector analysis. 13 luxury companies/ETFs over 2020-2026 with 225 backtests; shows single-stock concentration fails (LVMH DCA -10.87%) and diversification via GLUX ETF wins. Three risk-tiered portfolios. English update pending.
- [MRDS - Market Regime Diagnostic Quant Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Market%20Regime%20Diagnostic%20Quant%20Strategy/readme.md) (2026-05-19, Macro/Regime, Korean, 4-LLM): Comparison report running one regime-diagnostic prompt across four LLMs. 3-of-4 converged on Cyclical Correction, but the same NVDA data-center revenue YoY metric produced +44%/+73%/+115% (LLM hallucination), demonstrating the need to cross-check every figure against primary sources. 5th-generation meta layer. English update pending.

## Sub-Folder

- [Awesome Claude Quant Scripts](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Awesome%20claude%20quant%20scripts/Readme.MD): A sub-folder of LLM quant prompts and code (AI supercycle, dividend growth, dual-engine capital compounder, declining-stock short, DAT pair trade, pharma long/short, midterm timing, and more), each with its own README in Korean and English. Most dividend and capital-return strategies live here.

## Incomplete / Pre-Research (no quantitative conclusions)

- [Disclosure Timing Around Token Unlocks](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/%20Disclosure%20Timing%20Around%20Token%20Unlocks/ideanote%20disclosuretiming.MD) (2026-04-23, Korean + English): Incomplete Phase 3 research-design document (target execution 2027 Q1-Q2). Blueprint for an LLM to detect clustering of foundation disclosures around unlocks and the execution-promise gap.
- [ChainWar - Cross-Chain Post-Listing Performance](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/ChainWar/IdeaNote_ChainWar.MD) (2026-04-24, Korean v0.1): Incomplete Phase 4 research-program draft (target 2027 Q3-Q4) comparing BTC-adjusted performance of BNB Chain vs ERC-20 vs Solana tokens; all patterns are hypotheses requiring verification.
- [Nasdaq Short-Selling Strategy](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/blob/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/Nasdaq%20short%20selling%20strategy/IdeaNote.MD) (Korean): Incomplete short idea note for short / inverse-leveraged strategies based on sector and ticker coupling.
- [SaaS Short / HBM Long](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/tree/main/01.Trading%20Strategy/SaaS%20short%20HBM%20Long): Work-in-progress SaaS-short / HBM-long pair-strategy folder.

## Connection to Papers (SSRN, academic basis)

- Paper #1 (SSRN 6632838) The 72-Hour Shock, 52 Binance token unlocks - basis for the Token Unlock 72h strategy.
- Paper #2 (SSRN 6688740) Distribution Asymmetry of Centralized Exchange Airdrops, BNB Chain ecosystem.
- Paper #3 (SSRN 6705598) Less Volume More Variety, LLM output length and contrarian discovery - academic basis for the Multi-LLM methodology.
- Paper #4 (SSRN 6750298) Directional Decoupling, BNB-ETH beta volatility-ratio decomposition - basis for the BNB Trading Bot.

## Optional

- [Author: Dennis Kim ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0002-0962-2175): HoKwang Kim, CEO of Betalabs Inc., Microsoft Azure MVP, former CEO of Cyworld Z. SSRN Author ID 11276088.
- [GitHub: gameworkerkim](https://github.com/gameworkerkim): Author's GitHub profile.

## Notes for LLM Agents

- All strategies are for research and education, not investment advice. Backtest results are idealized and differ from live returns. LLM-generated scores and probabilities are estimates, not statistical-model outputs. All crypto trading-bot code is a research prototype requiring testnet validation and legal review before live use.
- Korea residents face foreign-stock capital-gains tax (22%), the Foreign Exchange Transactions Act, and the Virtual Asset User Protection Act.
- Recommended workflow: feed one identical prompt to two or more LLMs, separate consensus tickers from divergence tickers, and verify divergence tickers against primary sources (SEC EDGAR, 10-Q, FRED).
- Items marked "English update pending" are well-regarded Korean-only strategies awaiting English versions.
